description: Bonk (BONK) emerged in 2022 as Solana blockchain’s first dog-themed memecoin, rising through humorous branding, viral meme culture, and strong grassroots support. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 BONK gives original BONK holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, AI contract capability, turning BONK into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Bonk
